interfaces.name: getHomeDashboard
interfaces.description: Get data for the homepage including quick task shortcuts, recently viewed items, and saved items.

primary_action_key.description: UI action or navigation key associated with this task

interfaces.name: getBranchSearchFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the unified Bank & Branch Search / Branch Locator page.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: Search mode: 'bank_search' for name-based search or 'branch_locator' for area-based search.

interfaces.name: getBranchSearchViewState
interfaces.description: Get the persisted view state (filters and mode) for the Bank & Branch Search / Branch Locator page.

interfaces.name: updateBranchSearchViewState
interfaces.description: Update filters and search settings for the Bank & Branch Search / Branch Locator view state.

interfaces.name: searchBranches
interfaces.description: Search for branches using name-based or area-based filters and return summary results for listing.

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: Free-text query used mainly in 'bank_search' mode, e.g., 'Emirates NBD Bur Dubai Main Branch'.

parameters.name: bankId
parameters.description: Optional bank filter for results.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sorting of results; 'weekday_close_time_desc' is useful for finding latest-closing branches.

usd_transfer_cutoff_time.description: Cut-off time for USD transfers, if available for the branch.

interfaces.name: addBranchToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a branch to the current comparison selection, creating a comparison set if needed.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch to add to comparison.

parameters.name: sourcePage
parameters.description: Where the comparison selection was initiated.

interfaces.name: createOrReplaceComparisonSetFromSelection
interfaces.description: Create or replace the active branch comparison set from a list of selected branches (used when clicking 'Compare selected').

interfaces.name: getActiveBranchComparisonSetSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the active branch comparison set for showing 'View comparison (n)' controls.

interfaces.name: getBranchDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific branch, including codes, services, currency support, fees, and saved status.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier from the current page URL.

saved_branch_id.description: SavedBranch.id if this branch is already saved, otherwise null.

interfaces.name: copyBranchSwiftCode
interfaces.description: Copy a branch SWIFT/BIC code to the clipboard and return feedback.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier from the current page URL.

parameters.name: codeKind
parameters.description: Whether to copy the primary SWIFT/BIC code or one of the additional codes.

parameters.name: additionalCodeIndex
parameters.description: Index of the additional SWIFT/BIC code when codeKind is 'additional'.

interfaces.name: copyBranchRoutingCode
interfaces.description: Copy a branch routing/local branch code to the clipboard and return feedback.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier from the current page URL.

interfaces.name: saveBranch
interfaces.description: Save or favorite a branch for later reference.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier, usually from the current page context.

parameters.name: isFavorite
parameters.description: Whether to mark this saved branch as a favorite.

interfaces.name: getFeeComparisonFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Fee Comparison page, including banks, fee types, and currencies.

default_currency_code.description: Default currency code for fee comparison, typically 'AED'.

interfaces.name: getFeeComparisonResults
interfaces.description: Search and sort branches by specific fee criteria for comparison.

parameters.name: bankId
parameters.description: Filter to a specific bank for fee comparison.

parameters.name: maxFeeAmount
parameters.description: Maximum fee amount in the chosen currency. If omitted, no upper bound is applied.

parameters.name: currencyCode
parameters.description: Currency code for the fee amounts, e.g., 'AED'.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order of the fee comparison results.

is_cheapest.description: True for the cheapest branch(es) among the filtered results.

interfaces.name: getIbanToolsOverview
interfaces.description: Get the list of available IBAN tools and recommended IBAN-related guides.

interfaces.name: validateIban
interfaces.description: Validate an IBAN's structure and checksum and return detailed results including associated bank information when available.

parameters.name: iban
parameters.description: Full IBAN string to validate, e.g., 'AE070331234567890123456'.

interfaces.name: getBankOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level information about a bank and overall Dubai branch statistics.

parameters.name: bankId
parameters.description: Bank identifier from the current page URL.

interfaces.name: getBankBranchesForBank
interfaces.description: List branches for a given bank with optional filters (used on Bank Overview page).

parameters.name: bankId
parameters.description: Bank identifier from the current page URL.

parameters.name: area
parameters.description: Optional filter for area, e.g., 'Deira'.

interfaces.name: getBranchComparisonDetails
interfaces.description: Get detailed side-by-side comparison data for the branches in a comparison set.

parameters.name: comparisonSetId
parameters.description: Optional comparison set id. If omitted, the active comparison set is used.

items.description: Keys such as 'usd_transfer_cutoff_time', 'international_transfer_currencies' to highlight in UI.

interfaces.name: savePreferredBranchFromComparison
interfaces.description: Save the preferred branch directly from the comparison view (e.g., the one with the earlier cut-off time).

parameters.name: comparisonSetId
parameters.description: Comparison set id; if omitted, the active set is used.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch to mark as preferred from the comparison.

interfaces.name: removeBranchFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a branch from the active comparison set.

interfaces.name: getGuideFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and tag options for the Guides & FAQs listing.

items.description: Guide topic tags such as 'IBAN basics'.

interfaces.name: listGuides
interfaces.description: List guides and FAQs with optional search, tag, and reading time filters.

parameters.name: searchQuery
parameters.description: Search in guide titles and descriptions.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Filter guides by tag, e.g., 'IBAN basics'.

parameters.name: maxReadingTimeMinutes
parameters.description: Filter by maximum estimated reading time.

interfaces.name: getGuideDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content and metadata for a specific guide, including TOC sections and bookmark status.

parameters.name: guideId
parameters.description: Guide identifier from the current page URL.

interfaces.name: bookmarkGuide
interfaces.description: Bookmark a guide and optionally add it to the reading list.

parameters.name: guideId
parameters.description: Guide identifier, usually from the current page context.

parameters.name: addToReadingList
parameters.description: If true, mark this bookmark as part of the reading list.

interfaces.name: getBranchIssueReportContext
interfaces.description: Get summary information for the branch on the Branch Issue Report page.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier from the current page URL.

interfaces.name: submitBranchIssueReport
interfaces.description: Submit a correction or issue report for a branch.

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: Branch identifier from the current page URL.

interfaces.name: getSavedItemsOverview
interfaces.description: Get all saved branches and bookmarked guides for the Saved Items page.

interfaces.name: removeSavedBranch
interfaces.description: Remove a saved branch from the Saved Items list.

parameters.name: savedBranchId
parameters.description: Identifier of the SavedBranch to remove.

interfaces.name: removeSavedGuideBookmark
interfaces.description: Remove a saved guide/bookmark from the Saved Items list.

parameters.name: savedGuideBookmarkId
parameters.description: Identifier of the SavedGuideBookmark to remove.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including purpose, scope, data sources, and disclaimers.

interfaces.name: getContactOptions
interfaces.description: Get contact options and form configuration for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a general enquiry or feedback message through the Contact form.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Optional topic selected from contact options.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Privacy Policy page, including data collection and cookie usage.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfUseContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Terms of Use page, including disclaimers about accuracy and completeness of information.

interfaces.name: getHelpHowItWorksContent
interfaces.description: Get structured help content explaining how to perform key tasks like finding SWIFT codes, locating branches, comparing fees, and validating IBANs.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateBranchSearchViewState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize BranchSearchViewState for the current user and mode.

helperFunctions.name: _searchBranchesInIndex
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to execute optimized branch search against the underlying data store.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateComparisonSet
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or create the active BranchComparisonSet for the current user.

helperFunctions.name: _persistSavedBranch
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a SavedBranch and update in-memory cache.

helperFunctions.name: _persistSavedGuideBookmark
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist a SavedGuideBookmark and update in-memory cache.

helperFunctions.name: _copyToClipboard
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to copy a value to the clipboard and return success status.

helperFunctions.name: _recordRecentlyViewedBranch
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to update the recently viewed branches list when a branch detail is viewed.

helperFunctions.name: _recordRecentlyViewedGuide
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to update the recently viewed guides list when a guide detail is viewed.

helperFunctions.name: _loadStaticPageContent
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve static page content (about, privacy, terms) from configuration or CMS.

helperFunctions.name: _validateIbanChecksum
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to perform IBAN checksum and structure validation underlying validateIban.
